standing_actions.name: Agreeing
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands upright, nodding their head lightly with a soft smile, conveying agreement and approval through open and friendly body language.

standing_actions.name: Angry
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with fists clenched, shoulders tense, and brows furrowed, glaring intensely forward with an aggressive posture.

standing_actions.name: Bored
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with slouched shoulders, a vacant stare, occasionally shifting weight from one foot to another, showing clear disinterest.

standing_actions.name: Clapping
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands and repeatedly brings their palms together in applause, with an enthusiastic smile and upright posture.

standing_actions.name: Crying
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with trembling shoulders, covering their face or wiping away tears, body slightly hunched, expressing deep sadness.

standing_actions.name: Defeated
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with slumped posture, head lowered, arms hanging loosely by the sides, displaying an aura of exhaustion and resignation.

standing_actions.name: Dismissing Gesture
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands and waves one hand outward dismissively while turning their head slightly away, signaling disinterest or rejection.

standing_actions.name: Excited
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands lightly on their toes, bouncing slightly with sparkling eyes and an eager smile, radiating energy and enthusiasm.

standing_actions.name: Happy Idle
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands relaxed with a gentle sway, arms resting naturally, and a soft, content smile on their face.

standing_actions.name: Joyful Jump
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character bends their knees and leaps joyfully into the air, arms raised and a wide grin on their face, full of lively excitement.

standing_actions.name: Pointing Forward
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character points forward with one hand, with an angry expression.

standing_actions.name: Sad Idle
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands still with a drooping head, hunched shoulders, and a sorrowful expression, exuding a sense of loneliness.

standing_actions.name: Standing Arguing
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands firmly, gesturing sharply with their hands, leaning slightly forward with a stern expression as they argue intensely.

standing_actions.name: Standing Greeting
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands and waves warmly, nods slightly, or gives a small bow, maintaining a friendly and welcoming demeanor.

standing_actions.name: Standing Idle
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands upright with a neutral posture, arms resting naturally by the sides, showing a calm and passive state.

standing_actions.name: Surprised
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with eyes widened, mouth slightly open, and arms instinctively pulled back or raised, expressing shock or astonishment.

standing_actions.name: Talking
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands and moves their mouth naturally while occasionally gesturing with their hands to emphasize their words.

standing_actions.name: Thankful
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with a soft, grateful smile, bowing their head slightly and bringing their hands together as a gesture of appreciation.

standing_actions.name: Thinking
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with one hand resting under their chin, eyebrows slightly furrowed, and eyes gazing into the distance, deeply in thought.

standing_actions.name: Thoughtful Head Shake
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with a pensive look, gently shaking their head from side to side while frowning slightly, lost in contemplation.

standing_actions.name: Threatening
standing_actions.detailed_description: The character stands with a menacing posture, fists clenched and arms slightly raised, glaring intensely at the target, exuding an intimidating presence.

sitting_actions.name: Banging Fist
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits upright, banging fist to express anger.

sitting_actions.name: Cheering While Sitting
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits upright, clapping their hands rhythmically with a broad smile, leaning forward slightly in excitement.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Angry
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits rigidly with clenched fists, a scowl on their face, and tense body posture, radiating anger even while seated.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Clap Fast Speed
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits and claps their hands together rapidly with bright, enthusiastic energy, celebrating or showing strong approval.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Clapping Middle Speed
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits and claps their hands at a steady, moderate pace, smiling warmly, showing polite encouragement or support.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Disapproval
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits with arms crossed and head tilted slightly away, giving a disapproving look or shaking their head lightly.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Disbelief
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits wide-eyed, mouth slightly agape, and shakes their head slowly, clearly expressing disbelief or shock.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Idle
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits relaxed with a neutral expression, hands resting calmly on their lap or the armrests, simply waiting or resting.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Laughing
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits back with their mouth open in hearty laughter, possibly holding their stomach or clapping their hands in amusement.

sitting_actions.name: Sitting Talking
sitting_actions.detailed_description: The character sits comfortably, speaking naturally with occasional hand gestures, maintaining an engaged and conversational demeanor.

walking_actions.name: Dodging Back
walking_actions.detailed_description: The character dodges backward quickly, arms raised defensively.

walking_actions.name: Start Walking Middle Speed
walking_actions.detailed_description: The character begins walking at a moderate, natural pace, arms swinging gently and body posture relaxed.

walking_actions.name: Walking Backward With Head Down
walking_actions.detailed_description: The character carefully steps backward, head lowered, shoulders slightly hunched, suggesting caution or sadness.

walking_actions.name: Walking Backward
walking_actions.detailed_description: The character walks steadily backward, glancing occasionally over their shoulder, maintaining balance and awareness.

walking_actions.name: Walking Fast Speed
walking_actions.detailed_description: The character strides forward quickly, with arms swinging with greater force and an energetic, purposeful gait.

walking_actions.name: Walking Middle Speed
walking_actions.detailed_description: The character walks at a natural, steady pace, arms swinging slightly, maintaining a casual and comfortable posture.

transition_actions.name: Stand To Sit
transition_actions.detailed_description: The character bends their knees and lowers themselves carefully into a chair, placing hands on the armrests or thighs for balance.

transition_actions.name: Stand Up
transition_actions.detailed_description: The character leans forward slightly, pushes off with their hands, and rises smoothly from a seated to a standing position with controlled motion.
